{{Quote|I am the keeper of our histories and chronicler of the conquests of The One.|Gjarshi, to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="KOTOR" />}}
'''Gjarshi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Black Rakata]]. It was his job to chronicle the conquests and achievements of [[The One]]. When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] visited the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] for a second time, he chose to side with the [[Elders (Rakatan)|Elders]]—which angered The One, who then attacked Revan, but was slain. The rest of The One's tribe, including Gjarshi, attacked Revan but were subsequently [[Death/Legends|killed]].

==Behind the scenes==
If the player chooses the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] path, and sides with the tribe of The One, or lies to One about defeating the Elders, then it will be Gjarshi who tells the player of the history of the Rakata and the tribes.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
